tool_args.label: MTA Workforce Total as of December 31, 2025

payload.raw_value_text: 1% (791) self-identified as a person with a disability

tool_args.label: MWBE Managed Assets - Total Combined Plans

payload.raw_value_text: Total assets managed by MWBEs: $4.4 billion; or 35% of total assets
258 Title VI complaints and 3 Title VI lawsuits were received during the reporting term

tool_args.label: vCloud Tech Inc. Total Awards Since 2019

payload.raw_value_text: vCloud secured over $8.7M in software licenses and support, bringing its total awards since 2019 to more than $19M

warnings: metric_claim.entity is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency/entity names should link to entity records when the source supports the relationship.

payload.claim_text: Due to recent changes to the DBE Program, submission of the second semi-annual report is currently on hold.
payload.subject: DBE Program

tool_args.label: USDOT Interim Final Rule Restructured DBE Program

payload.claim_text: On Oct. 3, 2025, the U.S. Department of Transportation (DOT) issued an interim Final Rule (IFR) fundamentally restructuring the Disadvantaged Business Enterprise (DBE) and Airport Concessions DBE/ACDBE programs.
payload.subject: DBE Program

payload.claim_text: While the participation levels in the SDVOB percentage-based target have experienced a decline, the total value of awards has notably increased by over $1.5 million compared to the previous fiscal year quarter.
payload.subject: SDVOB Program

payload.claim_text: Ms. Norman reported that MWBE engagement shows a strong increase compared to the previous fiscal year.
payload.subject: MWBE Program

tool_args.label: Title VI: No Disparate Impact in Service Changes

payload.claim_text: No disparate impact findings in 2025 service adjustments; mitigation strategies applied where potential impacts were identified. Three (3) major services changes occurred during the reporting period which received an equity analysis.
payload.subject: Title VI Program

tool_args.label: DBE Second Semi-Annual Report on Hold

payload.gap_text: The 2nd Semi-Annual report is currently on hold due to recent changes in the DBE program as determined by the U.S. Department of Transportation (DOT).
DBE Certification activity is currently on hold due recent changes in the DBE program as determined by the U.S. Department of Transportation (DOT).

payload.description: Federal agency requiring Title VI compliance and DBE program reporting from MTA
Federal agency that issued interim Final Rule restructuring the DBE program in October 2025
Includes MTA, PANYNJ, NYSDOT, and NFTA. Initiated reevaluation process for DBE program after the USDOT Interim Final Rule.

Small Business Mentoring Program (formerly named Small Business Mentoring Program) designed to develop and grow emerging contractors through classes, on-the-job training, and technical assistance on prime contracts with MTA Agencies
